title: Spear Damage
description: A lightweight mod that boosts the damage of all spears by 2.5x, making them a viable and powerful weapon choice for your adventures.
body:
Spear Damage is a lightweight utility mod designed to adjust the combat balance of spears by increasing their base damage output.

🛠 Features
Damage Scaling: Increases the damage dealt by spears by 2.5x.

Dynamic Detection: Automatically identifies spear-type items to apply damage modifiers.

Compatibility: Designed to work with vanilla mechanics and external weapon frameworks (such as Better Combat).

Optimization: A script-light implementation aimed at maintaining standard game performance and server TPS.

Simple Installation: Functions immediately upon installation without the need for manual configuration.

📝 Project Details
This mod is intended for players who find the default spear damage values insufficient for their gameplay style. By applying a global multiplier, it ensures spears remain a viable high-impact choice compared to other weapon classes.
